name: 1:1 Mentorship
summary: A short student-friendly session for guidance on web development, project direction, learning roadmaps, or portfolio improvement.
deliverables: Actionable advice based on your current level

name: Resume Review and Help
summary: Resume feedback and improvement support for students and freshers who want a cleaner, stronger technical profile.
deliverables: Better structure for skills, projects, and achievements

name: Portfolio Guidance
summary: Guidance for students who want to improve their portfolio structure, project presentation, and personal branding.

name: Frontend Development
summary: Responsive frontend modules or small websites focused on clean UI, usability, and handover clarity.
deliverables: Basic deployment support for small scope

name: Backend Development
summary: Node.js and Express-based backend support for APIs, validation, routing, and simple data workflows.

name: Full Stack Development
summary: Small full stack builds with frontend, backend, database integration, and basic deployment support.

name: Website Security Review
summary: Basic website security review for owned websites or explicitly authorized targets only.
deliverables: Basic review of visible security issues
Clear ethical scope and limited engagement
legalNote: Only for systems you own or where you have written authorization.
